Customizable token for your project...

Looking for a solution to create your own token on the blockchain or distribute it to multiple recipients in an instant?

Powered by:

Benefits of customizable tokens

Customizable tokens offer a flexible solution for creating and managing digital assets on the blockchain. Whether you're looking to generate your own token or distribute it to multiple recipients quickly, these tools provide an easy way to customize and deploy tokens. With our Token Maker's Tools, you can automate the creation, deployment, and even airdrop of tokens to your list of recipients in just a matter of minutes.

With 20lab, you can create fully customizable ERC-20, SPL, and Sui tokens, giving you complete control over all included functions. This ensures peace of mind, as you can easily make adjustments whenever needed through our intuitive token owner dashboard. Tailor your token configuration, save on gas fees, and securely launch your crypto project on a wide range of supported blockchains.

Our Token Features

Create, manage, and deploy your own customizable tokens seamlessly on the blockchain.

Custom Token Creation

Easily create fully customizable tokens based on your project's needs, with full control over functionality.

Learn more

Token Deployment

Deploy your tokens securely on a variety of blockchain networks, including Ethereum, Solana, and more.

Learn more

Token Distribution

Airdrop and distribute your tokens to multiple recipients instantly with just a few clicks.

Learn more

Audits

Audited tokens created on CryptoTools

Blockchain Security

The tokens you create are built on a secure and robust blockchain, ensuring your assets and transactions are safe and reliable

Fast and Cost-Efficient

Create and deploy tokens quickly without worrying about high gas fees. Our platform offers fast and affordable token creation

Ownership and Control

With our token creation service, you maintain full control over your token. You decide its purpose, usage, and future governance

Customizable Token Features

Create tokens tailored to your needs with customizable features, including total supply, decimals, and token name. Design a token that fits your project perfectly

Create and deploy tokens quickly without worrying about high gas fees. Our platform offers fast and affordable token creation

Ownership and Control

With our token creation service, you maintain full control over your token. You decide its purpose, usage, and future governance

Login securely with any Web3 wallet

Crypto Tools is a non-custodial platform, meaning that you retain full ownership and control over the keys to the smart contracts you deploy using it. This ensures that you have complete authority and responsibility over your token and its associated contracts. The platform is designed to seamlessly integrate with a variety of wallet solutions, including browser-based wallets, hardware wallets, and advanced, bank-grade key management systems. With Crypto Tools, you can be confident that your tokens and private keys remain secure and under your sole control at all times.

Reviews

What Users say about CryptoTools

Alexander

Everything works seamlessly and is highly professional. When we encountered a technical issue with a router address on Uniswap, the support team promptly assisted us in diagnosing and resolving the problem. We will definitely use this service again!

Sophia

Outstanding service and exceptional support. They respond quickly to inquiries and are always ready to assist in any way possible.

Michael

This is the top ERC20 token generator with support for multiple chains, and the pricing is extremely affordable. The team behind it is always available to assist with any questions.

Isabella

An amazing tool for creating your own cryptocurrency! Excellent support and highly recommended!

William

With over a decade of experience in crypto, 20lab is my preferred launchpad. It provides the most functionality, is easy to use, and their customer service is exceptional.

SOlivia

I've been in crypto for over a decade, and 20lab is my go-to launchpad. They offer the most features, are incredibly user-friendly, and their customer service is outstanding.

F.A.Q

Frequently Asked Questions

  • Creating your own cryptocurrency token on CryptoTokenHub is an easy process that can be done with just a few clicks. Our intuitive interface is designed to simplify blockchain interaction and token creation, enabling you to launch your token in minutes.
  • LThe 'initial supply' refers to the number of tokens you create when setting up your token. It serves as the starting quantity for the distribution of your token. You have the option to adjust and change this supply later, depending on the features and requirements you select during the creation process.
  • Yes, you can choose to add a reflection to your token. This fee is applied to every transaction involving your token and can be set between 1% and 20%. The collected reflection is then distributed to all token holders, based on the number of tokens they hold.
  • Yes, when creating your token, you can choose to include a 'mint function.' This feature enables you to mint more tokens and expand your token supply as required.
  • Yes, you can include a 'burn function' in your token. This feature lets you burn (permanently remove) some of your tokens, which reduces the total supply and makes your token deflationary.
  • See more

CryptoTokenHub

Our team of experts is dedicated to providing a seamless token creation experience, with specialized services in multi-chain support, tokenomics, smart contract development, and more.
